  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Sawcut joints were executed too late",
    "Random cracking (out-of-joint cracking) has occurred in the slab"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Document the location and extent of all random cracks",
    "Consult with the structural engineer of record to determine if structural integrity is compromised",
    "Submit a remediation plan (such as epoxy injection or routing and sealing) for approval prior to final closeout"
  ],
  "rationale": "The sawcut joints were not cut within the required window (typically 4 to 12 hours after finishing, before shrinkage stresses exceed tensile strength), resulting in random cracking. This is a non-compliant, defective installation under ACI 302 and 308 guidelines.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 302.1R (Guide for Concrete Floor and Slab Construction)",
    "ACI 308R (Guide to External Curing of Concrete)"
  ]
}
